title: Allow Over-Enchanting
description: Allows you to combine enchantments in an anvil over it's default limit.
body:
This mod allows you to combine the enchantments of items in an anvil over it's vanilla limit (_technically_ up to the integer limit). The only limit is the "Too Expensive!" message, which you can disable using any of the many, many mods that remove it.

This works best with mods that give you items with impossible enchants, or if you want to create ridiculously stacked enchantments for items. (Want Infinity **II?** Now you can!)

Icon Credit: [Melon](https://github.com/Melonition)
